allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/synthesize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""text"": ""안녕하세요. 오늘은 재미있는 이야기를 하나 들려드리겠습니다."", ""language"": ""ko""}' --output test_1.7b_ko.wav)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/synthesize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""text"": ""Hello. Today I will tell you an interesting story."", ""language"": ""en""}' --output test_1.7b_en.wav)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/synthesize_scenes -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{""""scenes"""":[""""첫번째 장면입니다"""",""""두번째 장면입니다"""",""""세번째 장면입니다""""],""""language"""":""""ko""""}')

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''segments: {len\(d[""segments""]\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  [{i}] duration={s[""duration""]:.2f}s audio_len={len\(s[""audio""]\)}''''\) for i,s in enumerate\(d[''''segments'''']\)]")
